info.title: Fireguard Auth API
info.description: OAuth2 and OpenID Connect Authorization Server

200.description: List of audit events retrieved successfully

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of audit events with optional filters.
Retrieve a single audit event by ID.

RefreshToken.description: Use the refresh token cookie (automatically set) to get a new access token

Logout.description: Logout and revoke all tokens - requires Bearer access_token header

GetUserInfo.description: Get authenticated user information - requires Bearer access_token header

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect the access token to get its metadata

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid parameters

401.description: Invalid credentials - email or password incorrect

post.description: Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns an access token and sets a refresh token cookie.
Invalidate the current session by revoking tokens and clearing the refresh token cookie.

404.description: MFA challenge not found or no longer valid

post.description: Resend the MFA OTP code using the pre-auth token received during login.

RefreshToken.description: Use the refresh token cookie (automatically set) to get a new access token

Logout.description: Logout and revoke all tokens - requires Bearer access_token header

GetUserInfo.description: Get authenticated user information - requires Bearer access_token header

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect the access token to get its metadata

post.description: Verify the OTP code using the multi-factor authentication token received during login.

Logout.description: Logout and revoke all tokens - requires Bearer access_token header

GetUserInfo.description: Get authenticated user information - requires Bearer access_token header

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect the new access token to get its metadata

post.description: Exchange the refresh token cookie for a new access token. No request body required.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

get.description: Returns a list of all available permissions in the system. Permissions follow the "resource.action" naming convention (e.g., users.create, posts.delete). Requires permissions.read permission.

AssignToRole.description: Assign this permission to a role

400.description: Invalid request - validation failed (name format or length)

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

post.description: Creates a new permission with a unique name following the "resource.action" format. Permission names must be unique across the system. Requires permissions.manage permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

get.description: Returns details of a specific permission including its name, description, and creation date. Requires permissions.read permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

delete.description: Permanently deletes a permission. This will automatically remove the permission from all roles that have it assigned. Use with caution. Requires permissions.manage permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

patch.description: Updates the description of an existing permission. The permission name cannot be changed after creation to maintain integrity. Requires permissions.manage permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all roles with their associated permissions. Requires roles.read permission.

AddPermission.description: Add a permission to this role

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

post.description: Creates a new role with optional permissions. Role names must be unique and follow the naming convention (lowercase, starts with letter). Requires roles.create permission.

DeleteRole.description: Delete this role (if not a system role)

AddPermission.description: Add a permission to this role

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

get.description: Returns details of a specific role including all its assigned permissions. Requires roles.read permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

delete.description: Permanently deletes a role. System roles cannot be deleted. Users assigned to this role will lose these permissions. Requires roles.delete permission.

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

patch.description: Updates the description or permissions of an existing role. Role name cannot be changed after creation. Requires roles.update permission.

200.description: Permission added successfully - role returned with updated permissions

RemovePermission.description: Remove a permission from this role

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

post.description: Adds a permission to an existing role. If the permission is already assigned, no error is returned. Requires roles.update permission.

200.description: Permission removed successfully - role returned with updated permissions

AddPermission.description: Add a permission to this role

404.description: Role or permission not found, or permission not assigned to role

401.description: Authentication required - missing or invalid access token

delete.description: Removes a permission from an existing role. Returns the updated role. Requires roles.update permission.

post.description: Register a new OAuth2 client application. The response includes the client secret which must be stored securely as it will never be shown again.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific OAuth2 client app.

delete.description: Permanently remove a client application and all its associated tokens/consents.

patch.description: Modify settings of an existing client application.

post.description: Enable a deactivated client application, allowing it to request tokens again.
Disable a client application. It will no longer be able to request tokens.
Invalidate the current client secret and generate a new one. The new secret is verified in the response and must be saved immediately.

get.description: Returns facility types for UI selects.
Lists facilities for the target organization.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: When true, archived facilities are included. Default: false.

409.description: Facility code already exists in this organization

post.description: Creates a facility for the target organization.

get.description: Returns one facility by identifier for the target organization.

409.description: Facility code already exists in this organization

post.description: Archives one facility.
Moves a facility under a new parent.

503.description: Application is unhealthy - critical dependency failure

get.description: Returns the health status of the application and its dependencies (database, cache).
Returns notifications for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: When true, returns only unread notifications.

get.description: Returns a Mercure subscriber JWT and the private SSE topic for the authenticated user. The client must pass this token in the Authorization header (Bearer) when opening an EventSource connection to the Mercure hub.
Returns a notification owned by the authenticated user.

patch.description: Marks one notification as read for the authenticated user.

GetOpenIDConfig.description: Get the full OpenID Connect configuration

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect a token to validate it server-side

get.description: Returns the public keys used to verify JWT signatures as defined in RFC 7517. Use these keys to validate access tokens issued by this server.

GetJWKS.description: Get the JSON Web Key Set for signature verification

IssueToken.description: Issue an access token using the token endpoint

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect a token using the introspection endpoint

RevokeToken.description: Revoke a token using the revocation endpoint

GetUserInfo.description: Get user information using the userinfo endpoint

get.description: Returns the OAuth2 Authorization Server Metadata document (RFC 8414) with optional OpenID Connect extensions when available.
Initiate the OAuth2 authorization code flow (PKCE required).

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI registered for the client

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Opaque state value returned to the client

parameters.name: code_challenge_method
parameters.description: PKCE code challenge method (S256 or plain, defaults to plain)

GetUserInfo.description: Get user information after consent check

get.description: Check if the authenticated user has granted consent for a specific client and scopes.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The OAuth2 client identifier requesting authorization

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Space-separated list of requested OAuth2 scopes

post.description: Approve or deny a consent request and complete the authorization flow.

get.description: Terminate the current OpenID Connect session and optionally redirect to a client post-logout URI.

parameters.name: id_token_hint
parameters.description: ID token previously issued by this server (optional)

parameters.name: post_logout_redirect_uri
parameters.description: Client post-logout redirect URI (must be registered)

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: OAuth2 client identifier (required when post_logout_redirect_uri is provided)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Opaque state value returned to the client after logout

IntrospectToken.description: Introspect the issued token to get its metadata

RevokeToken.description: Revoke the issued token when no longer needed

RevokeRefreshToken.description: Revoke the refresh token when no longer needed

GetUserInfo.description: Get user information using the access token (pass as Bearer header)

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid parameters

401.description: Invalid client credentials or unauthorized grant type

post.description: Issue an access token using configured OAuth2 grant types (see discovery metadata).

RevokeToken.description: Revoke the token if it should be invalidated

post.description: Query the authorization server about the current state and metadata of a token as defined in RFC 7662.

IssueNewToken.description: Issue a new token after revoking the old one

post.description: Revoke an access token or refresh token as defined in RFC 7009.

CheckConsent.description: Check user consent status for a client

get.description: Retrieve claims about the authenticated user as defined by OpenID Connect Core 1.0.

ResendChallenge.description: Resend the OTP if canResendIn is 0

post.description: Creates a new OTP challenge and sends the code via the specified channel. Requires otp_challenges.create permission.

VerifyChallenge.description: Verify the OTP code if status is pending

ResendChallenge.description: Resend the OTP if canResendIn is 0

get.description: Returns the current status of an OTP challenge. Requires otp_challenges.read permission.

post.description: Resends the OTP code. Subject to cooldown period. Requires otp_challenges.resend permission.

410.description: Challenge expired or max attempts reached

post.description: Verifies the OTP code for a challenge. Requires otp_challenges.verify permission.

CreateChallenge.description: Create a new OTP challenge using one of these channels

get.description: Returns all available OTP delivery channels. Requires otp_config.read permission.

CreateChallenge.description: Create a new OTP challenge using one of these purposes

get.description: Returns all available OTP purposes with their default TTL and max attempts configuration. Requires otp_config.read permission.

VerifyChallenge.description: Verify the TOTP code from the authenticator app

post.description: Generates a new TOTP secret and returns a QR code URI for authenticator app setup. Requires otp_totp.setup permission.

get.description: Returns persisted onboarding progression for organization setup and exposes actionable endpoints for each step.

post.description: Rolls back the last rollbackable onboarding step for the authenticated user.
Starts or resets the persisted organization onboarding session for the authenticated user.

409.description: Step not available in current flow state

post.description: Executes the requested onboarding step and updates persisted flow state.

409.description: Step not available to skip in current flow state

post.description: Voluntarily skips a non-required onboarding step, allowing the flow to advance to completion without executing it.

get.description: Lists Organizations where the authenticated user is a member.

post.description: Creates a Organization and assigns the creator as owner.

get.description: Returns the list of countries supported for organization legal profiles, with ISO code, display name, and flag image URL.
Returns legal types and related constraints for UI selects. Rules can be adapted with the optional countryCode query parameter.

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to tailor legal requirements. Default: FR.

get.description: Returns Organization details if the user has Organization.read permission in that Organization.

404.description: Organization or legal profile not found

get.description: Returns the legal profile of an organization.

put.summary: Create or update organization legal profile
put.description: Creates or updates the legal profile and enforces required fields based on legal type.

post.description: Accepts an invitation token and creates/updates organization membership for the authenticated user.

get.description: Lists invitations created for an Organization.

post.description: Invites a user by email to join an Organization with one or more roles.
Revokes a pending invitation.

get.description: Lists Organization members and assigned roles.

post.description: Adds an existing user to a Organization and assigns one or more roles.
Assigns an existing Organization role to an existing Organization member.

get.description: Lists all roles defined for a Organization.

post.description: Creates a custom role inside a Organization with explicit permissions.

200.description: Password reset confirmed successfully. All sessions have been revoked.

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid parameters

post.description: Confirm password reset using the token, code, and new password. All active sessions will be terminated.

200.description: Password reset request processed successfully. If the email exists, a code has been sent.

ConfirmReset.description: Confirm the password reset using the token and code

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid email

post.description: Request a password reset by email. An OTP code will be sent to the user's email if the account exists.

ConfirmReset.description: Confirm the password reset using the new token and code

400.description: Invalid request - missing or invalid token

404.description: Reset challenge not found or no longer valid

post.description: Resend the password reset OTP code using the existing challenge token.

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user.

post.description: Revoke all sessions for the authenticated user (logout from all devices).

get.description: Get details of a specific session.

delete.description: Revoke a specific session. The user will be logged out from that device.

get.description: Returns a list of all tenants. Requires tenants.read permission.

post.description: Create a new tenant with custom OAuth2 settings.

get.description: Get details of a specific tenant.

put.description: Replace a tenant by ID. Requires tenants.update permission.

delete.description: Delete a tenant by ID. Requires tenants.delete permission.

patch.description: Update a tenant by ID. Requires tenants.update permission.

post.description: Activate a tenant by ID. Requires tenants.update permission.
Deactivate a tenant by ID. Requires tenants.update permission.

200.description: List of trusted devices retrieved successfully

get.description: List all trusted devices for the current user.

post.description: Register the current device as trusted.
Revoke trust for all devices.

delete.description: Revoke trust for a specific device.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users. Requires users.read permission.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Requires users.create permission.

get.description: Retrieve a user by ID. Requires users.read permission.

put.description: Replace a user by ID. Requires users.update permission.

delete.description: Delete a user by ID. Requires users.delete permission.

patch.description: Partially update a user by ID. Requires users.update permission.

post.description: Activate a user account. Requires users.update permission.
Deactivate a user account. Requires users.update permission.
Mark a user email as verified. Requires users.update permission.

actorEmail.description: Actor email (optional, depending on PII settings).

ipAddress.description: Client IP address (optional, depending on PII settings).

userAgent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event occurred.

recordedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the event was recorded.

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence number within the chain.

prevHash.description: Previous event hash in the chain.

AuditEvent.AuditEventOutput.jsonld-audit.description: Returns a paginated list of audit events.

email.description: Email address of the user attempting to authenticate

password.description: Password of the user (write-only, never returned in responses)

remember_me.description: Extend session duration (30 days if true, default 1 day if false)

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

mfa_required.description: If true, authentication is incomplete. Use mfa_token to verify code.

mfa_token.description: Temporary Pre-Auth Token (JWT) covering the partial authentication state.

mfa_method.description: The delivery method for the MFA code (email, sms, totp).

mfa_destination.description: The masked destination where the code was sent (e.g., "j***e@e****e.com" or "+336****5678").

mfa_resend_in.description: Seconds until MFA code can be resent

preAuthToken.description: The Pre-Auth Token received from the login response.
The Pre-Auth Token received from the login response.

code.description: The OTP code received by the user.

token.description: Challenge token to use in GET/verify/resend endpoints

purpose.description: The purpose of this OTP challenge

status.description: Current status: pending, verified, expired, or failed

expiresIn.description: Seconds remaining until the challenge expires

canResendIn.description: Seconds until OTP can be resent (0 = can resend now)

Challenge.ChallengeOutput.jsonld.description: OTP challenge management for verification and 2FA.

Challenge.CreateChallengeInput.description: OTP challenge management for verification and 2FA.

purpose.description: The purpose of the OTP challenge. Use GET /api/otp/purposes to list available values.

channel.description: The delivery channel for the OTP. Use GET /api/otp/channels to list available values.

recipient.description: The recipient email or phone number. If not provided, user's default will be used.

ttlSeconds.description: Custom time-to-live in seconds. Defaults to purpose-specific value.

context.description: Optional context data (transaction ID, description, etc.)

Challenge.VerifyOtpInput.description: OTP challenge management for verification and 2FA.

attemptsRemaining.description: Remaining verification attempts before the challenge is locked

Challenge.VerifyOtpOutput.jsonld.description: OTP challenge management for verification and 2FA.

Client.ClientInput-client.update.jsonMer.description: Updates name, redirect URIs, grant types, or scopes of an existing client.

Client.ClientInput-client.write.description: Register a new OAuth2 client application. The client secret is shown only once.

is_active.description: Whether the client is currently active

Client.ClientOutput.jsonld-client.read.description: Get details of a specific OAuth2 client. Secret is not included.

is_active.description: Whether the client is currently active

Client.ClientOutput.jsonld-client.read_c.description: Register a new OAuth2 client application. The client secret is shown only once.

propertyPath.description: The property path of the violation

message.description: The message associated with the violation

propertyPath.description: The property path of the violation

message.description: The message associated with the violation

keys.description: Array of JSON Web Keys for signature verification

issuer.description: Issuer identifier URL of the authorization server

revocation_endpoint.description: URL of the token revocation endpoint

introspection_endpoint.description: URL of the token introspection endpoint

end_session_endpoint.description: URL of the end session (logout) endpoint

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

parentFacilityId.description: Target parent facility identifier. Field is required; use null to detach from parent.

status.description: Overall health status of the service

database.description: Database connectivity status (when details are enabled)

cache.description: Cache connectivity status (when details are enabled)

Notification.MercureSubscriptionOutput.j.description: User notifications delivered by internal modules.

Notification.NotificationOutput.jsonld-n.description: User notifications delivered by internal modules.

has_consent.description: Whether user has granted consent for all requested scopes

granted_scopes.description: List of scopes already granted by the user

missing_scopes.description: List of requested scopes not yet granted

requires_consent_screen.description: Whether a consent screen should be displayed to the user

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI registered for the client

state.description: Opaque state value returned to the client

code_challenge.description: PKCE code challenge for authorization code flow

code_challenge_method.description: PKCE code challenge method (S256 or plain, defaults to plain)

approved.description: Whether the user approves the consent

client_id.description: Unique identifier of the OAuth2 client application (UUID)

scope.description: Space-separated list of requested OAuth2 scopes

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for token renewal (required for refresh_token grant)

code.description: Authorization code from /authorize endpoint (required for authorization_code grant)

redirect_uri.description: Redirect URI matching the authorization request (required for authorization_code grant)

code_verifier.description: PKCE code verifier for enhanced security (required for authorization_code with PKCE)

token.description: The token string to introspect (access_token or refresh_token)

token_type_hint.description: Hint about the token type to optimize introspection (optional)

active.description: Whether the token is currently active (not expired, not revoked)

client_id.description: Client identifier that requested the token

username.description: Human-readable identifier (email) of the resource owner

token_type.description: Type of the token (Bearer or refresh_token)

iss.description: Issuer URL of the authorization server

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens (optional)

token.description: The token string to revoke (access_token or refresh_token)

token_type_hint.description: Hint about the token type to optimize revocation (optional)

picture.description: URL of the user profile picture

email_verified.description: Whether the email address has been verified

updated_at.description: Time when the user profile was last updated (Unix timestamp)

Organization.CreateOrganizationInput-Org.description: Organization management and membership entry points.

Organization.OrganizationOutput.jsonld-O.description: Organization management and membership entry points.

OrganizationCountry.OrganizationCountryO.description: Reference data for supported countries in organization legal profiles.

roleIds.description: Initial role IDs for this invitation

countryCode.description: Legal country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Defaults to FR when omitted.

registrationNumber.description: Registration number (required for some legal types)

OrganizationLegalType.OrganizationLegalT.description: Reference data for organization legal types.

userId.description: User ID to add in Organization

roleIds.description: Initial role IDs for this member

reset.description: When true, resets the persisted onboarding session for the authenticated user.

value.description: The channel identifier (use this in API requests)

requiresDelivery.description: Whether OTP is actively delivered (false for TOTP which uses authenticator app)

value.description: The purpose identifier (use this in API requests)

ttlSeconds.description: Default time-to-live in seconds before OTP expires

maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of verification attempts allowed

token.description: Challenge token from the password reset request

code.description: OTP verification code received by email

success.description: Whether the password was reset successfully

errorCode.description: Error code when the operation failed

email.description: Email address of the user requesting password reset

success.description: Whether the request was processed successfully

message.example: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset code.

challengeToken.description: OTP challenge token for the confirm step (if available)

maskedRecipient.description: Masked destination where the reset code was sent (if available)

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the reset code expires (if available)

token.description: Challenge token from the password reset request

Permission.PermissionInput-permission.up.description: Permission management. Permissions define specific access rights.

description.example: Allows creating new user accounts in the system

Permission.PermissionInput-permission.wr.description: Permission management. Permissions define specific access rights.

name.description: Permission name in format "resource.action" (e.g., users.create, posts.delete)

description.example: Allows creating new user accounts in the system

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the permission was created

Permission.PermissionOutput.jsonld-permi.description: Permission management. Permissions define specific access rights.

Role.AddPermissionInput.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

permission_id.description: UUID of the permission to add to the role

Role.RoleInput-role.update.jsonMergePatc.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

description.example: Moderator role with content management permissions

permission_ids.description: List of permission UUIDs to assign to this role

Role.RoleInput-role.write.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

name.description: Role name (lowercase, starts with letter, may contain numbers and underscores)

description.example: Moderator role with content management permissions

is_system.description: Mark as system role (protected from deletion)

permission_ids.description: List of permission UUIDs to assign to this role

name.description: Role name (lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores)

description.example: Administrator role with full system access

is_system.description: Indicates if this is a system role (protected from deletion)

permissions.description: List of permissions assigned to this role

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the role was created

Role.RoleOutput.jsonld-role.read.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

ipAddress.description: Client IP address for the session.

userAgent.example: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the session was created.

lastActivityAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last activity.

isCurrent.description: Whether this session is the current one.

Session.SessionOutput.jsonld-session.rea.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user.

Tenant.TenantInput-tenant.write.description: Create a new tenant with custom OAuth2 settings.

requirePkce.description: Whether PKCE is required for OAuth2 flows.

allowedScopes.description: Allowed OAuth2 scopes for this tenant.

customIssuer.description: Custom issuer URL for this tenant.

requirePkce.description: Whether PKCE is required for OAuth2 flows.

allowedScopes.description: Allowed OAuth2 scopes for this tenant.

customIssuer.description: Custom issuer URL for this tenant.

requirePkce.description: Whether PKCE is required for OAuth2 flows.

allowedScopes.description: Allowed OAuth2 scopes for this tenant.

customIssuer.description: Custom issuer URL for this tenant.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the tenant was created.

Tenant.TenantOutput.jsonld-tenant.read.description: Create a new tenant with custom OAuth2 settings.

secret.description: Base32-encoded TOTP secret for the authenticator app

qrCodeUri.description: otpauth:// URI to generate the QR code

token.description: Trusted device token used for bypassing MFA on this device.

expiresAt.description: When the trusted device token expires.

TrustedDevice.TrustDeviceOutput.jsonld-t.description: Register the current device as trusted.

lastUsedAt.description: Last time the device was used.

TrustedDevice.TrustedDeviceOutput.jsonld.description: List all trusted devices for the current user.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the user was created.

lastLoginAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the last login.

bearerAuth.description: Value for the Authorization header parameter.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.name: Organization
tags.description: Organization management and membership entry points.

tags.name: Notification
tags.description: User notifications delivered by internal modules.

tags.name: Authorization - Permissions
tags.description: Permission management. Permissions define specific access rights.

tags.name: Authorization - Roles
tags.description: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) role management. Roles group permissions together.

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: Audit ledger events for security and compliance.

tags.name: Client Management
tags.description: OAuth2 client application management. Clients are applications that can request access tokens.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: User session management. Sessions track user authentication state across devices.

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: Multi-tenant configuration management. Tenants define OAuth2 settings for different Organizations.
